releases.author: SrPernax
releases.description:
Easy File Replace 1.0.0

This plugin is designed to solve a very common friction point in Obsidian: updating an attachment (like an image or audio file) without breaking all the links pointing to it across your vault.

Features
- Select an existing attachment in your vault and replace its internal data with a new file from your OS.
- The original filename and path are kept exactly the same, ensuring that absolutely none of your Markdown links break.
- Strictly prevents you from replacing a file with a different extension.
- Fully translated in English and Spanish.

How to use
You have two ways to trigger the replacement:
1. Context Menu: Right-click on any file in the File Explorer and select "Replace file (Easy File Replace)".
2. Command Palette: Open an attachment, bring up the command palette (`Ctrl/Cmd + P`), and run "Replace current file".
releases.name: 1.0.0 - Initial Release
